title: Strengths and pitfalls of NNT and NNH in early breast cancer escalation trials.
abstract: The management of patients with high-risk early breast cancer (eBC) requires balancing between clinical benefit and toxicity. Number Needed to Treat (NNT) and Number Needed to Harm (NNH) may provide a clinically intuitive framework to assess benefit-risk profiles, but their use in eBC has not been systematically explored.
